about.title: About
about.bio1: Hi, I'm Zvonimir Kožul — a passionate Full Stack Developer based in Široki Brijeg. I specialize in building robust web applications from the ground up, combining a clean, responsive frontend with a solid, scalable backend.
about.bio2: On the frontend I work with React and modern JavaScript/TypeScript. On the backend I build APIs and services with C# / .NET, using MySQL as my go-to relational database.
about.bio3: I love turning complex problems into simple, beautiful solutions — and I'm always looking for the next challenge to grow as an engineer.

projects.title: My
projects.p1desc: Business website for a freight transport company based in Mostar, BiH. Features an image slider, service overview, client testimonials, and a contact form with email, WhatsApp, and Viber support.
projects.p2desc: B2B webshop for a Brčko-based distributor of auto cosmetics, accessories, and agricultural equipment. Features an image carousel, product catalog, user login, and contact details.
projects.p3desc: Business website for a local transport company in Široki Brijeg offering domestic and international freight. Features a stats dashboard, blog with newsletter, careers section, and contact via WhatsApp, Viber, and email. Includes a CMS for content management.
projects.p4desc: Full-featured B2C webshop selling electronics, smartphones, gaming gear, watches, and more. Includes product catalog with discounts, shopping cart, user login, and secure card payments via Monri WebPay. Includes a CMS for content management.
projects.p5desc: Club website for a karate club with 25+ years of history in Široki Brijeg. Features tournament news and announcements, photo gallery, coach and member sections, achievement counters, and social media links. Includes a CMS for content management.
projects.p6desc: Online food ordering platform for a fast-food restaurant in Široki Brijeg. Features a categorized menu with item customization and add-ons, shopping cart, daily specials, and order placement via website, WhatsApp, or phone. Includes a CMS for content management.
projects.p7desc: Windows desktop application that reminds you to take a 5-minute break every 55 minutes to reduce eye strain and improve productivity.
projects.p8desc: A clean task management web app built with React and Vite. Allows users to add, complete, and remove tasks with a responsive, CSS-driven interface.
projects.p9desc: College final project — a full e-commerce platform for mountaineering and rescue equipment. Features a product catalog with categories, AJAX shopping cart, checkout with address and delivery options, product search, and a SQL Server database with stored procedures.
projects.p10desc: College project — a cross-platform mobile app built with React Native and Expo. Includes three mini-games (Tic Tac Toe, Hangman, Math Quiz), user authentication via Supabase, profile management with photo upload, and a global leaderboard.
projects.p11desc: College project — a two-part system: a React Native mobile app scans NFC tags and POSTs the data to Supabase, while a React + Vite web dashboard receives live updates via WebSocket and displays each scan as a card in real time.

experience.title: Work
experience.job1b1: Developed and maintained web applications using React and ASP.NET Core
experience.job1b2: Designed and optimized MySQL database schemas for improved performance
experience.job1b3: Collaborated with the team using Git and agile methodologies
experience.job2b1: Built responsive frontend interfaces with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap
experience.job2b2: Integrated REST APIs and implemented form validation on the client side
experience.job2b3: Participated in code reviews and contributed to internal tooling

contact.title: Get In
contact.infoText: I'm currently open to new opportunities. Whether you have a project in mind, want to collaborate, or just want to say hi — my inbox is open.
contact.successText: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.
